posts.text:
"You just don’t understand oilmen. We drill. If we have money we drill. If we don’t have money, we still drill. We always find a way to keep drilling. I don’t care if these things have negative ROIC. I’ve told you, I’m not a numbers man, I’m an oil man!! God put me on this earth to drill wells!!"
